svg.title: skill-everything architecture — single source of truth, four loaders
svg.desc: skills/_index.yml is rendered by tools/render_loaders.py into four tool-specific loader files: SKILL.md (OpenCode), CLAUDE.md (Claude Code), GEMINI.md (Gemini CLI) and a Cursor stub. All four loaders point at the same sub-skill directory: a horizontal strip of nine first-class skill folders, each with SKILL.md inside, demonstrating the Anthropic Skills folder pattern. A loaders-and-table-no-drift CI gate fails the build if any loader file diverges from the index.
svg.text: skills/_index.yml is the source. tools/render_loaders.py writes the four loader files. CI fails on drift.

g.text: all four loaders → same 9 sub-skill folders

svg.text: edit the index, regenerate, commit · drift fails CI
